archetypes.evidence: F' gauntlet-entry gate (highest-risk: irreversible gate decision + user-visible block). Skill-side PRIMARY pre-check parses each test's structured TMR: block (cli_parsing) + roadmap US set, asserts exactly-one spine:true per US at acceptable maturity (validation/invariant_coverage INV-001/006). Missing OR duplicate -> exit 2 naming the US: deterministic exit code + named US on stderr (error_transform/observability INV-002). Override only via --accept-missing-spine + --spine-override-reason (>=50 chars) appended to decisions.log; re-running on unchanged state yields the same exit code with an idempotent decisions.log append on override (idempotency). PRIMARY placement covers the Fizzy-dispatch path that enforce_pipeline_card_gate alone misses (INV-003).

Parallel guardrail subagent dispatch + aggregation (highest-risk: concurrency exposure + partial-failure false confidence). Five guardrails each run as their own subagent (self-contained prompt + file pointers + round diff); the main loop aggregates N structured returns keyed test/US (delivery_semantics). A subagent that dies/times-out/returns invalid JSON -> synthetic ORCH finding, blocking on gauntlet, warning on critique: never proceed on partial findings as if green (error_transform/fail-closed INV-010). Conflicting required_action on the same target+field -> conflict state requiring disposition BEFORE any journaled transition (INV-012). Each accepted state change appends one append-only journal record; structured per-guardrail output is the observability the token-only tracker lacks (INV-013).

TMR emission -> fizzy validator handshake (highest-risk: cross-repo contract boundary + silent-drop inconsistency). Skill emits the TMR field-for-field against the single canonical contract (referenced, never copied INV-008). fizzy P0 validates each field/enum; an unrecognized field or enum member -> NAMED rejection citing the field, never a silent drop/accept (validation/error_transform INV-004). Pre-fence fields are optional+warn-first, post-fence required, gated by liveness_contract_version -> no retroactive failure (delivery_semantics INV-016). run_evidence{result,env,commit,artifact} carried to fizzy sweep; a declared-but-never-run REAL-DATA critical-seam = failing (INV-017). The named-rejection error is the observable signal on the integration boundary (observability).
